_notes: Use only real homeowner review excerpts that have been approved for website use.
Valid market values: salt-lake-city-ut, st-louis-mo, kansas-city-mo.
The city field in this file controls which city page an excerpt reinforces. Nearby reviews may be intentionally routed to a city page when exact-city review volume is thin.
Reviews without a city assignment stay on the market hub carousel for that metro.
Service slugs are applied only when the review text clearly supports a specific service page.

items.quote: A few days ago, Good Attic installed insulation over our 3-car garage. It is a project we have wanted to do for a long time and should have done it earlier. From start to finish, it was a pleasure to work with them. They were quick to give us a bid, schedule an appointment and get the work done. Great communication. I also really liked the two men that did the job. They were respectful and hard working. I highly recommend this company!
items.alt: Google 5-star review for attic insulation in the Salt Lake market

items.quote: Great pricing, professional and quick! I highly recommend them. Thank you Austin, Dylan and Mateo for your professionalism and the quick instillation.
items.alt: Google 5-star review for attic services in the Salt Lake market

items.quote: Good Attic Insulation crew was great! They removed my old insulation, air sealed, and added brand new fiberglass insulation. There were electrical issues in the attic, but Good Attic was flexible with my situation and worked with me to get an electrician to fix the problems and came back right after that was done. Crew was nice and friendly and Patrick even helped with all the Rockymountainpower and Dominion Energy rebates. Now ready for winter, highly recommend!
items.alt: Google 5-star review for attic air sealing in the Salt Lake market

items.quote: Great experience! Fast turnaround—clean and fast and best price we were quoted. Helped us get the rebates and the paperwork for the tax credit. Would recommend.
items.alt: Google 5-star review for attic services in the Salt Lake market

items.quote: Austin and his crews were amazing! We had a tricky project due to a combination of a very narrow attic hatch (old house), and the installation of Rock Wool which requires a special order from Texas. Despite numerous setbacks of getting the Rock Wool to SLC due to the Christmas holidays, Austin's crew ultimately made it happen. They were extremely communicative during the whole process. They made it happen by the end if the year, and they went above and beyond replacing some venting that was done poorly by a former contractor and was a fire hazard. Hard working, communicative, and honest describe Good Attic. A special shout out to Mateo and Dillon for the removal of old insulation and getting it cleaned out, and to Randy and Angel for the installation of our fantastic new insulation.
items.alt: Google 5-star review for insulation removal in the Salt Lake market

items.quote: Good Attic installed insulation in our roof area. They did an excellent job. That afternoon we had turn down our heater it made such a difference. Our gas usage is down a third from what it was.
items.alt: Google 5-star review for attic insulation in the Salt Lake market

items.quote: Found out during pre-purchase home inspection when we bought our house from its second owner that the builder had neglected to insulate the attic that’s over the front room when they built a home in 2008. Got a reasonable and fair bid from Good Attic. Excellent price. Crew was professional and quick.Superb result. Already using less heat the day after they insulated that and increased the insulation above the bedrooms from 13 to 24 inches. Looking forward to seeing the summer results of the solar-powered attic fan they install installed at a nice discount. Definitely recommend.
items.alt: Google 5-star review for attic fans in the Salt Lake market

items.quote: Our house has always had two extreme temperatures. The basement is a freezer during the summer, and the upstairs is an oven. During the winter, the upstairs is a freezer, and the basement is an oven. Never a consistent and comfortable temperature. My kids always complain about being too hot or too cold. Worse yet, my electricity bill has been insane—over $140 more than our previous houses. I did a ton of research on attics, insulation, roofs, ventilation, soffit, facia, fans, etc. And I got bids from four different companies. Good Attic was by far the most holistic, professional, and transparent. They put together an estimate that addressed all my concerns and provided documentation and information that made it clear why I was having these problems and how to solve them. Then they delivered as promised!! They worked around my schedule, which was all over the plays due to some other work I was having done by electricians (installing new lights and outlets). The result is impressive! They cleaned, sealed, and insulated, and I can immediately feel the difference (and so can my wife and kids!) Of all the companies I talked to about doing this, I am glad I went with Good Attic. Excellent communication, holistic (doing the job well to ensure all problems are done, not just to get paid), professional, and clean. I am looking forward to my electricity bill going down and a consistent temperature throughout the year throughout my house!!
items.alt: Google 5-star review for attic air sealing in the Salt Lake market
tags: South Jordan | Lehi | Sandy | Highland | Salt Lake City

items.quote: Highly recommend! Good Attic is super efficient and friendly. They work to earn your business. They are 100% honest and transparent. Other competitive companies I had come out to quote weren't even able to get up through the access panel and still tried to give me an estimate. When the gentleman from Good Attic came out to quote, he was actually able to get up in the attic. He walked around, took a video of the whole thing, and showed me everything they were going to do. They moved quickly during install, got the job done in one day. They did a clean professional job and made sure to sweep up any remaining debris after as well. They sent me before and after pictures, I can already feel the difference in efficiency. My neighbors came over during install to get theirs quoted too! Thank you Good Attic!
items.alt: Google 5-star review for attic services in the Salt Lake market

items.quote: Update to my update. Patrick reached out and got it all corrected. He did all the communicating with Rocky Mountain and I got the confirmation from them. Thank you!!! Update. After service was completed the communication slowed down/stopped regarding rebates. Patrick said he submitted Rocky Mountain power rebate for me and I should expect a check. Never received I have reached out to him he would say he will get back to me or no responses. I hate to lower the rating the rebate was something we spoke about heavily during the quote. They were amazing! Patrick was awesome to communicate with and super friendly. They cleaned up everything after and we’re faster then the time they quoted. 10/10 recommend. Thank you!!!
items.alt: Google 5-star review for attic services in the Salt Lake market

items.quote: I live up Provo Canyon in a home that’s almost 100 years old that had an attic with old, dirty insulation that mice had gotten into over the years of vacancy that all needed to be cleaned out and new insulation blown back in. Lincoln and his crew Kevin & Josue came come out to tackle the difficult task and did an amazing job and kept a great attitude. These guys also inspected, Sealed unwanted holes, and ran a fogger to sanitize the attic. I can’t thank you enough for the job you guys did, I will most definitely be making referrals and calling you back for other services.
items.alt: Google 5-star review for attic pest remediation in the Salt Lake market

items.quote: From the appoinment scheduling to the final clean up the Good Attic employees were kind, honest, and quick.
